source_pr.title: *: support IF EXISTS/IF NOT EXISTS for some DDLs
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

update parser to include https://github.com/pingcap/parser/pull/337, and make some `IF EXISTS`/`IF NOT EXISTS` clauses work.

### What is changed and how it works?

1. check `IF EXISTS` for
	1. `DROP COLUMN`
	2. `CHANGE COLUMN`
	3. `MODIFY COLUMN`
	4. `DROP INDEX`
	5. `DROP PARTITION`
2. add `IF NOT EXISTS` for
	1. `ADD COLUMN`
	2. `ADD INDEX`
	3. `CREATE INDEX`
	4. `ADD PARTITION`

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

Code changes

 - Has exported function/method change
 - Has interface methods change

The recorded evidence is a dependency hash line, not a concrete intermittent flaky signature, and the patch does not show a narrowly targeted test-stabilization change. Keep the conservative fallback classification.
